rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICTOR TSUI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/26/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) 15 day's notice on DE-121 must be re-done and include the required language found in Local Rule 14.1. D. 6) 2) If it appears that property will pass to a citizen of a foreign country, notice shall be given to a recognized diplomatic or consular official of the foreign country maintaining an office in the United States. [Probate Code 8113]. 3) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 4) If an heir or devisee died after the decedent, the petitioner must allege whether or not a personal representative has been appointed for such deceased heir or devisee. If no personal representative has been appointed for the post-deceased heir or devisee, or such personal representative is the same person as the petitioner, all heirs and/or devisees of the post-deceased heir or devisee must be listed. [LRSF 14.18 D. 3)] 5) A hard copy of the proposed order must be provided to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. A file stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/17/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK MON GEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/26/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Even though there has been a waiver of account the Examiner must be able to trace the funds from the I&A value of $1,695,477.14 to the assets on hand of $1,182,036.36. Please explain what happened to $513,440.78 in estate assets. 2) Please provide the legal authority for the California probate court to order distribution of an Oregon Dept. Fish & Wildlife Limited Entry Permit #62849. 3) Please file a proof of satisfaction and release of the creditor claim signed by claimant Scott I. Bassin, Prof. Corp.. 4) Please explain why it appears over $250,000.00 has been kept in a single account when the FDIC limit is $250,000.00. A file stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/17/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD GARLAND NOBLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/26/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) 15 day's notice must be re-done and include the required language found in Local Rule 14.1 D. 6). 2) Please explain why signed and dated unfiled receipts of distribution were mailed to the Examiner when the court has not ordered distribution. Unfiled documents should not be mailed to an examiner. (See Local Rule 14.7). It appears the Executor breached their fiduciary duty and distribution was done without court authority or the unfiled signed receipts are not accurate. Please explain. 3) The request for distribution in the petition must include the complete description of each security not just 50% of stock portfolio or various common stocks. [See CRC 7.651 (b)(4) and Local Rule 14.35 I. 6) a.] 4) The proposed order must include the complete description of each security not just 50% of stock portfolio or various common stocks. [See CRC 7.651 (b)(4) and Local Rule 14.35 I. 6) b.]. Please submit a new proposed order to the examiner in room 202. A file stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/17/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BENJAMIN MARK TASKAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 10/17/22. Judicial Council form DE-120 is a mandatory form of notice for a petition filed in probate, including a spousal property petition. proof of service of that form must be filed showing no less than 15 days notice of the continued hearing date. in addition, the Order should not have the deed attached, and the description in #9 of the proposed order is not sufficient for a condo. the legal description in the deed must be copied onto attachment 5a. deadline for the new order and filing the new POS of the NOH form is noon on 10/10/22. please note, examienr continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.
